data.title: Beyond sells major stake in Zulily for $5 million
data.description: Despite the change in ownership, Zulily isn’t going away. The brand will continue to operate under its existing name, with a relaunch of its ecommerce platform planned in the coming months, according to the CEO of Proozy, which now owns the brand.

data.title: Ecommerce Trends: What agentic commerce means for online retail
data.description: As online retailers begin testing agentic AI for their ecommerce needs, shoppers are already trying it out using subscriptions as business leverage agents on the backends of their websites.

data.title: Edibles launches a marketplace for same-day THC products
data.description: Thomas Winstanley, a cannabis industry veteran and former chief marketing officer at Theory Wellness, led the Edibles marketplace initiative.

data.title: How QXO’s acquisition accelerates Beacon’s digital commerce strategy
data.description: This acquisition is not simply about scale — it’s about transforming Beacon’s already successful business model by leveraging QXO’s proven expertise in technology and operational efficiencies.

data.title: Mirakl names a new CEO of the Americas
data.description: Scott Eckert will expand the company’s marketplace and retail media services, focusing on increasing the adoption of Mirakl Ads for first-party and third-party products.
